name: Portfolio Intelligence API
description: Express API server for Portfolio Intelligence portal with Slack Canvas integration

PORT.description: Port for the web server (Heroku sets this automatically)

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string (automatically set by Heroku Postgres addon)

SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET.description: Slack app signing secret from api.slack.com/apps (Settings > Basic Information)

SLACK_BOT_TOKEN.description: Slack bot OAuth token from api.slack.com/apps (OAuth & Permissions)

ALLOWED_ORIGIN.description: Frontend origin URL for CORS (e.g., https://swashington-netizen.github.io)
